home.title: PEIC — Medical Equipment Manufacturer & Integration Partner | Est. 1968
home.description: PEIC manufactures sterilization systems and integrates global medical technologies with procurement, installation, and lifecycle service support across India.

products.title: Medical Equipment Catalog — Sterilization Systems & Med-Tech Partners | PEIC
products.description: Explore PEIC-manufactured sterilization systems and partner medical technologies for hospital, biomedical, and procurement evaluation.

solutions.title: Medical Equipment by Specialty — CSSD, OT, Oncology, Imaging | PEIC
solutions.description: Review PEIC equipment portfolios by department, including CSSD, OT, oncology, radiology, neonatal care, dental suites, labs, and research facilities.

about.title: About PEIC — Medical Equipment Manufacturing in India Since 1968
about.description: Learn about PEIC's manufacturing heritage, Mumbai facilities, certifications, institutional references, and lifecycle support model.

service.title: Medical Equipment Service & AMC/CMC Support | PEIC
service.description: PEIC provides AMC/CMC contracts, spare parts, refurbishment, service coordination, and lifecycle support for supplied medical equipment.

resources.title: Technical Documentation & Certifications | PEIC
resources.description: Request PEIC product brochures, user manuals, specifications, and compliance certification documents.

careers.title: Careers at PEIC — Medical Technology Manufacturer | Mumbai
careers.description: Explore Mumbai-based careers in medical equipment manufacturing, biomedical service, quality control, and institutional sales at PEIC.

contact.title: Contact PEIC — Equipment Procurement & Service Enquiries | Mumbai
contact.description: Contact PEIC for equipment procurement, specification support, AMC/CMC contracts, documentation, and service enquiries.
